visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border colors to separate panels (Technical Look). NO rounded corners for main layout panels to maximize screen real estate and convey a technical/brutalist aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights. Use shadow-2xl ONLY for floating elements like dropdowns.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism. Use Flat Solid surfaces to prevent visual refraction of dense code data.
visual_enhancers.theme_toggle: Mandatory dark/light mode toggle accessible from settings or sidebar.

components.sidebar_drawer: Use Shadcn Sheet (side='left') for the File Explorer. Swipeable and compact. Use dense spacing (p-2).
components.bottom_toolbar: Fixed at bottom (h-14). Contains icon buttons for Explorer, Search, Terminal, Settings. Must have a distinct top border.
components.tab_bar: Horizontal scrollable flex container (h-10). Active tab has top border (accent color) and matches editor background. Inactive tabs have surface background.
components.terminal_drawer: Use Shadcn Sheet (side='bottom') or a resizable bottom pane for output. Background must be darker than editor.
components.code_editor: A full-width, full-height container with syntax highlighting and line numbers. Monospace font is mandatory.
components.floating_action_button: Prominent 'Run Code' FAB (Primary Accent color) positioned at bottom-right, just above the bottom toolbar. Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md), not fully circular.

motion.tabs: Instant switch (no animation) to feel snappy like a desktop IDE.
motion.buttons: Subtle scale down on active/press (scale-95) and background color shift on hover. MUST explicitly set text color on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure code syntax colors meet APCA/WCAG AA against the background.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all buttons (especially in the file explorer tree and tab close buttons).
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., 'file-explorer-toggle', 'run-code-button', 'tab-close-button').

media.icons: Use lucide-react for UI icons. Do not use AI emojis.

3d_libraries.usage: None. This is a high-performance 2D developer tool.

empty_state_background.category: Used sparingly at 10% opacity for the empty state when no files are open.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first, VS Code-like web application in React using Tailwind CSS.
Use .js files (JSX syntax) as per the environment, NOT .tsx files.
CRITICAL: The layout must be strictly 100dvh to prevent body scrolling. Scroll should only happen within the code editor, terminal, and file explorer areas.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the layout structure, but use Shadcn's Sheet component for the File Explorer (left) and Terminal (bottom). Override Shadcn default radii to be sharper (rounded-none).
Implement multi-tab logic: maintain state of open files and the current active file.

For the code editor, build a functional textarea with line numbers next to it, using a monospace font (JetBrains Mono). If you can, integrate PrismJS for highlighting, or keep it clean and performant.
The 'Run' button must be prominently displayed (either via FAB or top toolbar) and mock execution by printing output to the Terminal drawer.
Implement a robust mock file system holding files and folders in state, capable of creating, renaming, and deleting files.
Do not center align text globally. Keep all code and file tree items left-aligned.
Ensure dark/light theme switching works instantly via a context or state. Default to dark theme.
Include data-testid on every interactive element.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Do not make generic centered layouts. Prioritize high-density, functional interfaces. Use strict z-index management for drawers and modals. Exclude transforms from universal transitions. Use solid, high-contrast surfaces instead of glassmorphism to preserve readability of dense code. Create depth via 1px borders and tight padding. All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Do not use AI emojis for icons; strictly use lucide-react. NEVER use complete transparent background in headers, overlays, or surfaces that have content under it.
